## What & why

## Type
<!-- Put an x in the box(es) that apply. -->
- [ ] New data source / layer (keyless)
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

## Checklist
- [ ] **Keyless & free** — any new data source needs no API key, account, or paid tier
- [ ] **No secrets** committed (`.env`, keys, tokens, personal data)
- [ ] Engine still imports (`uv run python -c "import engine.server"`) / UI typechecks (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] Tested locally
- [ ] Focused scope (one feature/fix)
